tree-expanded-state.title: Controlled expanded state and branch lines
tree-expanded-state.description: Shows `GrTree` as a hierarchical explorer where external orchestration controls group expansion and visual branch lines.

tree-filtering.title: Filtering through instance API
tree-filtering.description: Filtering is worth showing not as a magic prop but as a real integration through the exposed `filter()` method and an external input.

tree-drag-and-slot.title: Drag-and-drop with custom row slot
tree-drag-and-slot.description: Combines two important capabilities of a complex tree: rearrange drag-and-drop and custom row rendering through the default slot.

filtering.placeholder: Filter tree nodes by label or team

drag.hint: Drag a row handle to reorder or nest nodes
